payload.label: window
payload.long_description: Full rectangular white-framed window covered by closed white horizontal (venetian) blinds with thin slatted lines and diffuse daylight seeping through; dark curtains are partially visible at the left and right edges and the bottom sill and small gap are visible — approximately 2.0 m from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"window","short_description":"white horizontal blind-covered window","long_description":"Full rectangular white-framed window covered by closed white horizontal (venetian) blinds with thin slatted lines and diffuse daylight seeping through; dark curtains are partially visible at the left and right edges and the bottom sill and small gap are visible — approximately 2.0 m from the camera.","attributes":["white horizontal blinds","venetian slats","closed blinds","white painted frame","dark side curtains (partial)","rectangular shape","visible bottom sill","diffuse light through slats"],"distance_from_camera_m":2.0}
